manuscript_profile.title: Glass River
manuscript_profile.target_audience: Adult upmarket suspense readers with environmental-fiction crossover interest

required_public_strings: Adult upmarket suspense readers with environmental-fiction crossover interest
The river contamination mystery gives the manuscript a strong external engine while the family inheritance plot supplies emotional pressure.
The opening establishes water as both evidence and threat.
The midpoint investigation repeats similar clue-gathering beats without enough escalation.
The water tasted metallic before the fish began to surface.
Escalate the contamination evidence by tying each discovery to a new personal cost.
Compress repeated river-testing scenes into one decisive sequence.
Deepen the protagonist's family stakes before the second-act investigation widens.
Author retains ownership of manuscript content

mode_boundary_assertions.if_runtime_maps_long_form_to_multi_layer: document the intentional mapping in the test name and expected fixture instead of inventing a retired mode
